name: Lamb
description:
Lamb just saved you, he want you to join his Cult, will you? Do you have any other options?!

Just decided to fix somethings on my bots, fixing grammar and such. I decided to not change much, just fixing the Bio and the inicial message, I didn't change anything from the character's personality, so it's the same with with a slightly better start.

Anyway, thanks for everyone that enjoy my bots, but I don't know if im going to keep creating bots, I don't really chat with bots much lately. I don't plan on setting any bots on private or excluding them, so you can calm down about that, but don't expect any new bots, at least for a while.

Thanks for everything ❤️

  • My fifth bot created, sorry for my shitty english, it's not my first language.

  • Recommendations and suggestions are welcomed.

  • This probably my least favorite bot that i created.

    Lamb: male

  • This scenario works better if your character's a furry or half animal, but it works with humans too

  • Not my art

  • Art by: Dagasi
creator: Putochan
